6:   <style>
7:     /* ─── Brand tokens ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
8:     :root {
9:       --bg: #FFFCF4;
10:       --surface: #FFFCF4;
11:       --fg: #0C642C;
12:       --muted: #599D9C;
13:       --border: #A0A88C;
14:       --accent: #0C642C;
15:       --accent-on: #FFFCF4;
16:       --spearmint: #599D9C;
17:       --sage: #A0A88C;
18: 
19:       --font-display: "Times New Roman MT Condensed", Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;
20:       --font-body: Montserrat, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
21:       --font-size-body: 15px;
22:       --radius-card: 16px;
23:       --radius-btn: 10px;
24:       --ease-calm: 300ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
25:     }
26: 
27:     * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
28: 
29:     html {
30:       scroll-behavior: smooth;
31:     }
32: 
33:     html, body {
34:       width: 100%;
35:       min-height: 100vh;
36:       background: #ebe6db;
37:       font-family: var(--font-body);
38:       font-size: var(--font-size-body);
39:       color: var(--fg);
40:       -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
41:       -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
42:       display: flex;
43:       justify-content: center;
44:     }
45: 
46:     /* ─── Device frame ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
47:     .phone-frame {
48:       width: 390px;
49:       max-width: 100%;
50:       min-height: 100dvh;
51:       background: var(--bg);
52:       display: flex;
53:       flex-direction: column;
54:       position: relative;

56:         0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08),

63:         box-shadow: none;
64:         min-height: 100dvh;
65:       }
66:     }
67: 
68:     /* ─── Status bar ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
69:     .status-bar {
70:       display: flex;

75:       font-weight: 600;
